title: Add linked workflow start API route
depends_on: T020: linked workflow session service implemented
objective: Expose POST /api/sessions/:id/workflow/start with request validation, stable error codes, and linked workflow session service delegation.
expected_outputs: src/server/router.ts （修改，如 route dispatch requires it）
anti_goals: Do not overload POST /api/sessions with source lifecycle semantics.
Do not return vague generic errors for contract cases.
acceptance_criteria: Route validates workflow, contextStrategy, summaryInstructions, and clientRequestId.
Route returns target session workflow summary and link metadata.
